title: Codeforces Round #1020 (Div. 2)
description: Rated round for Div. 2 participants. 5 problems, 2.5 hours. Register on Codeforces before the round starts.

title: LeetCode Weekly Contest 452
description: Weekly contest on LeetCode. 4 problems, 90 minutes. Good for interview prep and rating.

title: HackDTU 2026 — Registration Deadline
description: 36-hour flagship hackathon at DTU. Over ₹5L in prizes. Team of 2-4. Register before the deadline.

title: Tech Club Workshop: System Design 101
description: Hands-on intro to system design — scalability, databases, load balancers. Bring your laptop. Venue: CS Seminar Hall.

title: ICPC Asia Regional — Amritapuri Site
description: Registrations open for the ICPC Amritapuri Regional. Team of 3, university eligible. Don't miss the early bird deadline.

title: LeetCode Biweekly Contest 160
description: Biweekly contest on LeetCode. 4 problems, 90 minutes. Rated for all users.

title: Smart India Hackathon — PS Release
description: Problem statements for SIH 2026 expected to be released. Start forming teams and identifying problem areas early.

title: Tech Club Open House
description: Open house for freshers and new members. Learn about our tracks — CP, ML, Development, Research. Free snacks.

title: AtCoder Beginner Contest 410
description: ABC round on AtCoder. Great for beginners and intermediate competitive programmers. 8 problems, 100 minutes.

title: Google Summer of Code — Coding Period Begins
description: Official coding period for GSoC 2026 contributors begins. Start communicating with your mentors daily.

title: Codeforces Round #1025 (Div. 1 + 2)
description: Combined Div. 1 + Div. 2 round on Codeforces. Higher difficulty, more rating points on the line.

title: Tech Club ML Showcase
description: Members present their ML projects — from image classifiers to LLM fine-tuning. Open to all. Venue: Main Auditorium.
